findings.title: Path traversal vulnerability in file reading
findings.description: The filename parameter is directly concatenated into the file path without validation, allowing attackers to use path traversal sequences like '../../../etc/passwd' to access files outside the uploads directory
findings.fix: Validate and sanitize the filename parameter by checking for path traversal sequences, using os.path.basename() to strip directory components, and using os.path.join() with proper path validation
